config_metadata.experimentName: A counterfactual simulation model of causal judgments for physical events. (Exp 2)
config_metadata.description: Participants watched three-ball collision clips and provided either counterfactual judgments about removing ball A or ball B, or causal responsibility judgments for both balls.
